title: Shimla Ka Pashmina
subtitle: Baraf ki chadar mein dhoka...
mystery: Mall Road ki sabse mehengi dukaan se 5 lakh ka asli Pashmina shawl chori ho gaya. Dukan mein chaar log the aur bahar baraf gir rahi thi.

clues.name: Pighli Baraf
clues.description: Kanch ke counter ke paas paani ki boondein (pighli baraf).

clues.name: Bus Ticket
clues.description: Delhi ki aakhri bus ka ticket zameen par mila.

clues.name: Kaala Glove
clues.description: Sirf ek kaala chota dastana.

clues.name: Giri Hui Coffee
clues.description: Bahar table par aadhi coffee giri hai.

characters.name: Rohan
characters.description: Bohot thand lag rahi hai, jaldi nikalna chahta hai.

dialogues.trigger: Aap yahan kya kar rahe the?
dialogues.response: Main sirf window shopping kar raha tha. Mujhe nikalna hai.

dialogues.trigger: Counter pe pighli baraf kaise aayi?
dialogues.response: Main wahan shawl dekhne gaya tha! Main chori kyu karunga?

dialogues.trigger: Ye Delhi ki bus ka ticket aapka hai?
dialogues.response: Haan, meri bus chhutne wali hai! Mujhe jaane do!

characters.name: Vikram
characters.description: Dukaan ka naya manager, owner se naaraz hai.

dialogues.response: Jab main coffee lene gaya tha. Main piche tha!
Ek customer se takra gaya tha, mera glove bhi vahin gir gaya.

characters.name: Mrs. Kapoor
characters.description: Ameer customer, usse Pashmina chahiye tha par mehenga laga.

dialogues.trigger: Aap trial room me kya kar rahi thi?
dialogues.response: Dusre shawl try kar rahi thi!

characters.name: Bhim Singh
characters.description: Aadhi neend me tha.

dialogues.response: Sirf ek ladka Delhi bus stand ki taraf bhaga.

title: Jakhoo Mandir Ki Ghanti
subtitle: Pahadi mandir se chori...
mystery: Pahadi par sthit Jakhoo Mandir se sadiyon purani sone ki choti ghanti chori ho gayi. Wahan bandar bahut hain, par chor insaan hi hai.

clues.name: Gira Hua Prasad
clues.description: Murti ke peeche chane aur prasad bikhra hai.

clues.name: Lal Dhaga
clues.description: Deewar ki keel par phansa ek lal dhaaga.

clues.name: Mitti Wala Joota
clues.description: Deewar par chadhne ke nishan.

clues.name: Khaali Thaila
clues.description: Prasad bechne wale ka thaila jiska rang lal hai.

characters.name: Ramu Prasad Wala
characters.description: Bandaron se nafrat karta hai, aur karze mein dooba hai.

dialogues.response: Bandar le gaye honge!

dialogues.trigger: Deewar pe tumhara lal dhaga kaise fasa?
dialogues.response: Main toh bas... bandar ko bhaga raha tha, isliye chada deewar pe!

characters.name: Pandit Ji
characters.description: Mandir ki ghanti ko lekar pareshan hain.

dialogues.trigger: Murti ke piche prasad kyu gira hai?
dialogues.response: Shayad bandar andar ghus aaye honge. Ya kisi ne lalach diya hoga unhe.

characters.name: Neha
characters.description: Bandaron ki photo kheench rahi thi.

dialogues.trigger: Aapne deewar pe kisi ko chadte dekha?
dialogues.response: Haan, ek aadmi lal kapdon mein piche ki deewar faand raha tha.

characters.name: Raju Sweeper
characters.description: Subah sabse pehle aaya tha.

dialogues.trigger: Kab pata chala ghanti gayab hai?
dialogues.response: Main subah jhaadu laga raha tha tab kisine deewar ke paas jhaadiyan todi thi.

spots.name: Mandir Ki Deewar 🧱
spots.description: Uchi deewar, uspe chadhna mushkil hai.

title: Toy Train Ka Safar
subtitle: Kalka se Shimla ke raste mein...
mystery: Train ke chalte safar mein ek VIP passenger ka briefcase gayab ho gaya. Train kahin nahi ruki thi, matlab chor train ke andar hi hai.

clues.name: Phata Ticket
clues.description: Kisi aur passenger ka phata hua ticket washroom me mila.

clues.name: Ticket Puncher
clues.description: TT ka puncher VIP ki seat ke niche gira mila.

clues.name: Keechad Wale Joote
clues.description: Keechad se sane joote ke nishan AC coach me the.

clues.name: Tooti Chain
clues.description: Chain pulling handle ke paas kharoch ke nishan.

characters.name: Ramesh TT
characters.description: Sabhi coaches me aane jane ki ijazat hai.

dialogues.response: Mujhe kya pata? Main toh bas check kar raha tha.

dialogues.trigger: Tumhara puncher VIP ki seat ke niche kaise?
dialogues.response: Woh... gir gaya hoga jab ticket check kar raha tha! Maine bag nahi liya!

characters.name: Seth Ji
characters.description: Bahut ameer aur gusse wale.

dialogues.response: Jab TT mera ticket check karke gaya, uske baad main so gaya tha.

characters.name: Chai Wala
characters.description: Sabse zyada ghoomta hai.

dialogues.trigger: Tumhare jooton me keechad kyu hai?
dialogues.response: Station pe paani gira tha sahab. Main AC coach me nahi gaya.

characters.name: Aman
characters.description: Door ke paas khada tha.

dialogues.response: Nahi! Maine TT ko darwaze ke paas kisi cheez ko dhakka dete dekha tha.

title: Baga Beach Ki Surfboard
subtitle: Goa ki lehron mein raaz...
mystery: Ek international surfing competition se pehle champion ka custom-made surfboard chori ho gaya. Beach par 4 suspicious log the.

clues.name: Pink Surf Wax
clues.description: Tumbuo ke bahar pink color ka special surf wax gira hai.

clues.name: Bade Sandals
clues.description: Ek bade size ka sandal jisme pink wax laga hai.

clues.name: Khali Sunscreen
clues.description: Tent ke andar khali sunscreen ki bottle.

clues.name: Toote Goggles
clues.description: Zameen par toote hue swimming goggles.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: Hamesha second aata hai, competition jeetna chahta hai.

dialogues.trigger: Tumhara pink wax wahan kyu gira?
dialogues.response: Mera wax nahi hai, koi bhi khareed sakta hai.

dialogues.trigger: Tumhare sandals me wax kaise aaya?
dialogues.response: Main... main bas tent check karne gaya tha! Maine board nahi churaya!

characters.name: Sam
characters.description: Uska board gayab hai, bahut gusse me hai.

dialogues.response: Bohot halka tha. Aur sirf Leo pink wax use karta hai.

characters.name: Tony
characters.description: Beach bar chalata hai.

dialogues.response: Leo subah jaldi mere bar ke paas aaya tha, usne kuch chhipaya.

characters.name: Ravi
characters.description: Sabpe nazar rakhta hai.

dialogues.response: Ye kal Sam ke dost ke the, unka jhagda hua tha.

title: Aguada Fort Ka Raaz
subtitle: Purane lighthouse me naya dhoka...
mystery: Lighthouse ke andar chal rahi ek secret shooting ka camera memory card chori ho gaya. Wahan sirf 4 crew members the.

clues.name: Kaala Hairpin
clues.description: Camera tripod ke paas ek kaala hairpin gira mila.

clues.name: Face Powder
clues.description: Camera lens par thoda sa white face powder laga hai.

clues.name: Fati Script
clues.description: Zameen par director ki fati hui script.

clues.name: Cola Can
clues.description: Adha khali cola can.

characters.name: Simran
characters.description: Star banna chahti thi, par background me rakhi gayi.

dialogues.response: Pata nahi, hava se ud gaya hoga!

dialogues.trigger: Tripod ke paas tumhara hairpin mila.
dialogues.response: Camera set karte waqt gir gaya tha. Maine footage delete nahi ki!

characters.name: Karan
characters.description: Gusse me pagal ho raha hai.

dialogues.response: Main break pe gaya tha, camera chalu choda tha. Makeup artist Simran wahan thi.

characters.name: Rahul Star
characters.description: Apni hi duniya me hai.

dialogues.response: Main vanity van me juice pi raha tha bro. Script bahut boring hai.

characters.name: Chhotu
characters.description: Lights theek kar raha tha.

dialogues.response: Didi (Simran) bahut dhyan se camera dekh rahi thi jab director sir nahi the.
